title: Resume Summary for Job Application
scenario: Create a resume summary for a job applicant with a background in marketing and sales. The summary should highlight the applicant's relevant skills and experience, and should be tailored to the specific job description. The summary should be under 100 words and include at least two of the applicant's key skills.
constraints: Must include at least two of the applicant's key skills

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the summary meets the word count and key skills requirements.
Evaluate if the summary is clear and easy to understand.
Check for any grammar or spelling errors.
Evaluate if the summary is relevant to the job description and the applicant's experience.
